llm3.overview_of_the_company: Tesla, Inc. is an American electric vehicle and clean energy company based in Austin, Texas. It was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning and has since become one of the leading electric vehicle manufacturers in the world.
